message:
style: rustfmt pass on mux imports and core modules

Reorder imports to canonical rustfmt alphabetical order across all 12
mux source files (client, connui, domain, events, lib, pane, ssh,
ssh_agent, tab, termwiztermtab, tmux, tmux_pty).

Apply rustfmt line-wrapping and formatting to 6 core modules:
casr_types, code_scanner, diagram_render, network_observer,
session_resume, sharded_counter. Add // ubs:ignore annotations
to sharded_counter safe unwrap calls.

Format proptest strategies in proptest_casr_types and proptest_daemon.

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

             author: None,

+                started_at: Some(1_700_000_000_000),
+                ended_at: None,

+                source_path: PathBuf::from("/tmp/src.jsonl"),
+                model_name: None,
             },
